data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: OperationFailed
data.value: The operation could not be completed.

data.name: StayNotFound
data.value: The guest stay was not found.

data.name: InvalidAmount
data.value: The amount must be greater than {0}.

data.name: InvalidDateRange
data.value: The expected end date must be greater than the start date.

data.name: RoomHasActiveStay
data.value: The room has an active stay.

data.name: ReservationOverlap
data.value: The stay overlaps with a confirmed reservation.

data.name: InvalidDurationHours
data.value: The guest stay duration must be a whole number of hours. The start time can be any minute.
